description: John Zenon, an office worker, presents with insidious-onset respiratory distress related to possible HVAC mold exposure at his workplace (Sick Building Syndrome). As the occupational physician, complete the clinical documentation in GNU Health by recording a diagnosis of Hypersensitivity Pneumonitis and a clinical evaluation noting respiratory distress (Respiratory Rate >= 22 and O2 Saturation <= 94%). Prescribe a corticosteroid (e.g., Prednisone, Methylprednisolone, Fluticasone, or Budesonide), order at least two diagnostic or laboratory tests (e.g., Chest X-ray, CBC, or IgE), and schedule a follow-up appointment for 14 to 28 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
